title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: The reviewer finds "The Souler Opposite" hilariously original, touching on love's resilience through comedic storytelling with Chris Meloni earning high praise for his Oscar-worthy performance; they express optimism about similar projects.

title: Reckless
review_summary: A reviewer enjoys this mini-series' exploration of romance between characters despite some clichés; they suggest it would benefit from being condensed to half its length while appreciating Robson Greene's performance in the lighthearted storyline. There is an upcoming sequel on Netflix.
